homeIntro: We are One Degree North, FRC Team 4817 from Singapore American School. Since 2013 we've been designing, building, and programming competition robots — and teaching the next generation of our team how to do the same.
aboutStory:
One Degree North began in 2013 as a small group of students tinkering with Lego Mindstorms. Today we are a team of around 30 students who design, machine, wire, and program a full-scale competition robot every season as Southeast Asia's first FRC team.

Our team is built on communication, collaboration, innovation, and sportsmanship. Experienced members mentor new ones, and our alumni — now at schools like UC Berkeley, Duke, Princeton, Brown, and Waterloo — stay involved long after they graduate.

Everyone on the team belongs to a subteam, and every subteam runs its own training modules so knowledge gets passed down season after season.
